characters.name: Alex Cruz
characters.description: Alex CruzBiographyGenderMaleStatusMarried toRonnie CruzFamilyKaylie Cruz(daughter)Ronnie Cruz(wife)Leo Cruz(son)RomancesRonnie Cruz(wife)OccupationSports Manager(current)Pro Baseball Player(former)AppearancesSeasons1•2•3Episodes21First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.08:"United Stakes"Portrayed byJason Manuel OlazabalAlex Cruzis a recurring character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is the father ofKaylieandLeo Cruz, and is his daughter's manager. He was portrayed byJason Manuel Olazabal. He isLeoandKaylie's father, and a former baseball star. He was a pro baseball player, winning World. At a party for the team, he got a necklace made for Kaylie with all the diamonds from his World ring. Kaylie later returned it at the National meet. At one point he was also Kaylie's manager but after Kaylie winning at nationals, she demanded he just be her father, and hiredMJ. Kaylie eventually rehires him andRonnieto be her co-managers in the hopes that it will make them get back together after he found out that Ronnie had an affair with Marty.

characters.name: Annie McIntire
characters.description: Annie McIntireis a recurring character in thethirdseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is the wife ofCoach McIntire. She is portrayed byBre Blair,

characters.name: Austin Tucker
characters.description: Austin TuckerBiographyGenderMaleRomancesKaylie Cruz(girlfriend)OccupationGymnastAppearancesSeasons2•3Episodes18First2.01:"Friends Close, Enemies Closer"Last3.08:"United Stakes"Portrayed byZane HoltzAustin Tuckeris a recurring character in thesecondandthirdseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is a male gymnast and the boyfriend ofKaylie Cruz. He is portrayed byZane Holtz. He is the men's Olympic Champion. He begins training atThe Rock, because he was inspired by how dedicated the Rock girls are. He andKayliedon't get along because she doesn't wantPaysonandEmilyto get distracted. He later invites the girls to a party at his lake house.Lauren, Payson, Emily and Kaylie all go, after promising not to go. Austin and Kaylie kiss at his party, after he comforts her. He also notices Kaylie becoming thinner, and tries to stop her anorexia because his younger sister had problems because of an eating disorder. He eventually brings it up to her parents, and Kaylie asks him why he's doing this. He admits he cares for her, yet he doesn't know why. When Kaylie faints on the beam during the Worlds tryouts, he catches her. First shown in Seson 2 episode "All or Nothing", he is immediately shown as a player. Given his reputation, Emily and the other girls initially dislike him, but when Austin saves Emily when she's stuck in a French train station, they begin to form a friendship. In the next episode, "Battle of the Flexes", Austin joins the Rock crew and starts to train there, much to Kaylie's dismay. Austin then tries to renovate the gym to his liking, starting an all out war between the boys and the girls. As time progresses, Kaylie's dislike for him grows when she thinks Emily and Austin are getting too close. The truth, however, is that Austin is helping Emily towards her dream. In "Party Gone Out of Bounds", Austin invites the girls to a party at his new lake house. Despite Kaylie's controlling behavior, the girls end up going, and Kaylie and Austin kiss. Their relationship becomes very complicated with love and jealousy combined. When Kaylie begins starving herself and doing rigorous workouts, Austin warns her not to push herself too hard. He tells her about his sister who became too skinny and wound up getting hurt, ending her gymnastics career. Austin tells Kaylie's parents about his concern and admits he is crazy about her. They ignore him. After a stint in rehab, Kaylie recovers, though she still isn't fond of him since he told her parents about her anorexia. Refusing to give up, Austin helps Kaylie with her moves and she earns a spot on the World team as an alternate. After Payson gets hurt, Kaylie fills her spot and makes them #1 in the country.

characters.name: Becca Keeler
characters.description: BeccaKeelerBiographyFull NameRebecca KeelerAliasesBecca(by everyone)GenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyKim Keeler(mother)Mark Keeler(father)Payson Keeler(sister)OccupationGymnastAppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes10First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.04:"And the Rocky Goes To..."Portrayed byMia Rose FramptonBecca Keeleris a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She isPayson's younger sister, and a junior gymnast atThe Rock. She is not as focused or serious about her gymnastics as Payson. She is portrayed byMia Rose Frampton. Becca is the younger and more free-spirited sister of star gymnast Payson Keeler. She trains as a gymnast at The Rocky Mountain Gymnastics Training Center, but unlike Payson, she does not train as an elite gymnast. Becca prefers to have fun and learn the tricks rather than focus on performing skills perfectly. On her days off she loves to hang out with her friends and acts like a normal child. In the fourth episode of season two, "And the Rocky Goes To...", she unveils a Level 8 tumbling pass to Payson, and it is later revealed that Sasha says she is "peaking" and can start training to reach the elite level. However, by the end of the show Becca had not pursued that path.

characters.name: Brian Kmetko
characters.description: Brian KmetkoBiographyGenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyEmily Kmetko(older sister)Chloe Kmetko(mother)OccupationStudentAppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes15First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.10:"At the Edge of the Worlds"Portrayed byWyatt SmithBrian Kmetkois a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is the younger brother ofEmilyand one of her biggest supporters. He is portrayed byWyatt Smith. He uses a wheelchair and has a seizure disorder for which he takes medication. He is supportive of his sister and Damon brought to one his sisters's games that was out of state. By drive an tour and he is talented with a computer. He is usually the one who helps Chloe with the finance problems. He was showing symptoms of having seizures. Emily, who was desperate to get his medicine, she stole it from the pharmacy and was arrested for trying to help her brother.

characters.name: Carter Anderson
characters.description: Carter AndersonBiographyGenderMaleStatusSingleRomancesKaylie CruzLauren TannerOccupationDenver Elite GymnastAppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes26First1.01:"Pilot"Carter Andersonis a main character in thefirstseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It, and a recurring in thesecond. He isKaylie Cruz's ex-boyfriend and former gymnast atThe Rock, currently training atDenver Elite Gymnastics Club. He is portrayed byZachary Abel. Carter had inter- Relations with Lauren after a fight with Kaylie, but didn't have the nerves to tell Kaylie about the affair in fear that she will be deeply upset. He later gave Kaylie a necklace that had belonged to his late mother. When his relationship with Kaylie is revealed at a party, he argues with Kaylie's dad about who loves Kaylie more. He stands up for Kaylie, refusing to name the girl he's involved with to Sasha and is subsequently suspended from the Rock and banned from Nationals. He later reveals his affair with Lauren, causing Kaylie to break it off with him.

characters.name: Chloe Kmetko
characters.description: Chloe KmetkoBiographyGenderFemaleStatusSingleFamilyEmily Kmetko(daughter)Brian Kmetko(son)RomancesSteve Tanner(ex-boyfriend)AppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes40First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.20:"Worlds Apart"Portrayed bySusan WardChloe Kmetkois a main character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is the single mother ofEmilyandBrian. She is portrayed bySusan Ward. Chloe is the mother of Emily and Brian. She has many financial struggles, at one point calling an ex-boyfriend she vowed never to talk to again in order to fund Emily's requirements for Nationals. She cares for both of her kids, and does whatever she can to try and get them what they want. Chloe works at a salon. She is eccentric and energetic, and often reveals information that she shouldn't about her children to Sasha and Damon. Chloe has a crush on Sasha, the coach at Emily's gymnastics club. After setting up a date with a man she meets online, she finds out it is Lauren's father, and the two begin secretly dating. Eventually, Emily and Lauren find out and this causes a rift between the two. Unmarried and has a different sense of fashion than the others. Works at strip club to help pay for Emily's gymnastics. She leaves the show in season two because Emily got pregnant, with her ex-boyfriend, Damon's child and decided to quit gymnastics, and move to Las Vegas to raise the baby with her god mother.

characters.name: Coach McIntire
characters.description:
Coach McIntireBiographyFull NameMac McIntireAppearancesPortrayed byDondré T. WhitfieldMac McIntireis the Women's Olympic Gymnastics Team coach for the 2012 Summer Olympics. He was also the USA Training Center gymnastics coach. He is intimate with the USA Training Center nutritionist. He is portrayed byDondré T. Whitfield. Coach McIntire is a coach employed by the NGO to train the girls likely to make the London 2012 Olympic Team. Among these girls are Payson Keeler, Kaylie Cruz, Lauren Tanner, Kelly Parker, Wendy Capshaw and Jordan Randall, the two latter being newcomers to the series.
Initially, McIntire struggles with forging the all-important Coach-Athlete bond, as he is used to training elite Male gymnasts as opposed to elite Female gymnasts. However, in episode 3 of season 3, this bond is formed and the girls continue to improve in their performance.

characters.name: Damon Young
characters.description: Damon YoungBiographyGenderMaleStatusIn a relationship withEmily KmetkoFamilyWalter(step-father)Unnamed childRomancesEmily Kmetko(girlfriend)Kaylie Cruz(kissed)AppearancesSeasons1•2First1.03:"Blowing Off Steam"Portrayed byJohnny PacarDamon Youngis a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is an aspiring songwriter, member of the bandShelter Pups, and is friends withRazor. He is portrayed byJohnny Pacar. He andEmily Kmetkobecome close while he is filling in for Razor atThe Pizza Shackand they begin dating. Damon eventually takes Emily's virginity. In the meantime, Damon works on his music withKaylie Cruzand they end up kissing in the recording booth ("Requiem for a Dream"). He later finds out that Emily quits gymnastics to be with him while he works on his music. They later get married and live a happy life. Damon is a friend of Razor's, who is also the songwriter for their band. He becomes closer to Emily while filling in for Razor at The Pizza Shack. He kissed Emily for the first time, after Emily's mom told him she thought her daughter had never been kissed. Damon tells Emily that he can't just be her friend, and later becomes her closest confidante. He moved to L.A. because of a band who wants to record songs that he wrote. In L.A., his songs are picked up by a band called Pinky Promise, but he refuses to sign the contract and decides to sing his songs himself. He comes back to Boulder without telling Emily and ends up in jail for buying a mixer he didn't know was stolen. Razor ends up bailing him out, but Emily breaks up with him once she finds out that he was in jail, comparing him to the men her mother has dated who constantly end up in jail and ask for help. In the episode "Save the Last Dance" Damon tries singing a song he wrote for Emily in front of a crowd, but instead chokes up causing him to run off stage. Damon has showed that he supports Emily and her dream throughout the show, doing some of the nicest things for her.

characters.name: Darby Conrad
characters.description: Darby Conradportrayed byMeagan Holder, was a coach atThe RockafterSasha Belovleft. While Payson and Emily show disdain towards Darby due to her unconventional way of coaching, Lauren Tanner was ecstatic when she found out that she would be taking over. Darby's coaching method was a major difference from Sasha's. Rather than being strict, she had more of a "best friend" lenient approach which was shown to hurt the girls after their meet in Pinewood.

characters.name: Ellen Beals
characters.description: Ellen BealsAppearancesPortrayed byMichelle ClunieEllen Bealsis a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is the head of theNational Committee. She doesn't likeSashaand wants to get rid of him, and she's not afraid to ruin the girl's futures. She is portrayed byMichelle Clunie. Lauren leaks the photo of Sasha and Payson kissing to her, and she shows it to the National Committee to get him kicked out of the gymnastics world. Also, she is shown to dislikeEmilyin many episodes. After the National Committee firesMarty Walsh, she takes over as coach of theNational Team.

characters.name: Ellen Beals
characters.description: Ellen BealsAppearancesPortrayed byMichelle ClunieEllen Bealsis a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. characters.name: Emily Kmetko
characters.description: Emily KmetkoBiographyGenderFemaleStatusIn a relationship withDamon YoungFamilyChloe Kmetko(mother)Brian Kmetko(brother)Unnamed childRomancesDamon Young(boyfriend)OccupationStudentThe RockGymnast(former)Pizza Shack Employee(former)AppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes40First"Pilot"Last"Requiem for a Dream"Portrayed byChelsea HobbsEmily Kmetkois a main character in thefirstandsecondseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She was a member of theRocky Mountain Gymnastics Center, and is datingDamon Young. She is portrayed byChelsea Hobbs. She becomes a member of the National Team and later is chosen for the World's Team, but her career is jeopardized when she is arrested for stealing her brothers medication. Coach Marty Walsh recruited Emily to The Rock after seeing her practicing gymnastics at the YMCA in Fresno. In addition to her gymnastics training, she works nights and weekends atThe Pizza Shackto help support her family financially. Emily falls in love with her coworkerDamon Young, an aspiring songwriter who at first is too scared to sing his own music. She becomes a member of the National Team and later is chosen for the World's Team, but her career is jeopardized when she is arrested for stealing her brothers medication and her job. Emily is very independent and hard-working. She is the "outsider" and very different from the other girls at The Rock.
characters.personality_section: Emily is very independent and hard-working. She is the "outsider" and very different from the other girls at The Rock.

characters.name: Heather

characters.name: Ike Benzinger
characters.description: Ike Benzingeris a character in theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is portrayed byAndrew James Allen. Ike was Payson's first friend at Taft High school and is the school outcast. He has a pessimistic outlook on life and hates coming to school everyday. At first Ike and Payson shared the same views since Payson was depressed her gymnastcis career ended, Ike encouraged Payson to skip some of her classes and and join him and his friends to go behind the school and smoke pot. Eventually Payson became friends with Heather the school's peppy over-achiever who showed her that there is more in life than gymnastics and that just because her career has ended doesn't mean she should stop living. After that Payson ended her friendship with Ike saying she's tired of his negative attitude towards life and doesn't want to end up like him, behind the school smoking pot. In the episode "Save the Last Dance" Ike comes to the school dance in a tuxedo surprising everybody and dances with Payson and apologises for trashing everything she believed in and Payson asks him if he has anything in his life to be passionate about and he says he isn't there yet but hopes he will be one day. That was the last time we see Ike.

characters.name: Ivanka Kirilenko
characters.description: Ivanka KirilenkoIvanka Kirilenkois a minor character in thesecondseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is portrayed byMonica Hewes. Ivanka is first introduced at World's in 2011. She is the Russian Federation's "Rising Star" as no one has seen her compete ever. For her beam she does a front tuck mount. She scores a 15.8 on beam leading Russia to a silver team medal overall and  she was a ding dong at doing gymnastics! But people think that she’s pretty but people say ya pretty! Pretty ugly! All though she did lose to team USA witch means she’s not an amazing gymnast as everyone thinks she is just likeGenji Cho.

characters.name: Jake
characters.description: JakeAppearancesPortrayed byRussell Charles PittsJakeis a minor character in theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is portrayed byRussell Charles Pitts.

characters.name: Jordan Randall
characters.description: Jordan RandallAppearancesPortrayed byChelsea Tavares Jordan Randallis a foster kid, who has been moved from home to home. She is a gymnast who appears at the Olympic Training Center in Season 3. Originally, Jordan was not selected to be in the training center, but eventually convinced Coach Macentire to watch a video of her doing a triple back dismount on bars. This was very difficult trick and has never been done in competition. After this, she is training at the center. Most of the girls at the gym dislike her. She keeps to herself most of the time and has a friendship with her pet rabbit. Later in the show, she develops a relationship with Kaylie Cruz. She's a badass and will not give up on anything. She can come off as mean and very intimidating because she is a very strong character. She was sexually abused as a child by Coach Keegin. She makes the Olympic Team In the Season 3 finale.

characters.name: Katerina Paynich
characters.description: Katerina PaynichBiographyGenderFemaleStatusSingleOccupationGymnastAppearancesSeasons2Episodes2Portrayed byThunderbird DinwiddieKaterina Paynichis a minor character in thesecondseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is a rival gymnast. She is portrayed byThunderbird Dinwiddie.

characters.name: Kaylie Cruz
characters.description: Kaylie CruzBiographyGenderFemaleFamilyAlex Cruz(father)Ronnie Cruz(mother)Leo Cruz(brother)RomancesAustin Tucker(boyfriend)Carter(ex-boyfriend)Damon Young(kissed)Nicky Russo(fake-boyfriend)OccupationGymnast atthe RockOlympic Gymnast for 2012Gymnast at USA Olympics Training CenterAppearancesSeasons1•2•3Episodes48First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.08:"United Stakes"Portrayed byJosie LorenKaylie Cruzis a main character in thefirst,secondandthirdseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is an elite gymnast atthe Rocky Mountainand National Champion for 2009 and 2010. She was portrayed byJosie Loren. At the beginning of the series, her 'perfect' life with having a 'secret' boyfriend', a good and supportive coach, 2 best friends and a happy and loving parents, all crashes down. While Kaylie is described as pretty, popular and "the girl who has everything," it is later revealed that she is very vulnerable, compassionate and kind-hearted. Kaylie is outgoing and basically just wants to be a regular teenager. She can be selfish but in the end she feels bad about acting mean. Kaylie is very stubborn and sticks to what she wants and believes in. Kaylie is the "girly-girl" of the group.

characters.name: Kelly Parker
characters.description: Kelly ParkerBiographyFamilySheila Babboyan(mother)Kelly Parkeris the former National Champion, who trains at Denver Elite. She is the former national champion who was beaten by Kaylie Cruz during the season one mid-season finale. Prior to this she was Payson Keeler's chief rival with the two finishing one-two at the nationals prior to the commencement of the show. She is portrayed byNicole Gale Anderson. Kelly is the former National Champion, who has since become a big celebrity. She and Payson had a big rivalry, but after Payson beats Kelly at The Rock Invitational, Kelly loses some of her attitude. Kelly makes fun of all of The Rock girls, especially Emily. At Nationals, Kaylie beats Kelly, who eventually places second in the competition. She is the first to notice how dangerously thin Kaylie is becoming. Kelly is manipulative, determined and often cruel. While to the media she is charming, sweet, and committed to her "clean" image, she is not above bringing down the gymnasts around her to win. Though, as shown through her relationship with Payson Keeler, this does not mean she never respects them. Kelly is manipulative, determined and often cruel. While to the media she is charming, sweet, and committed to her "clean" image, she is not above bringing down the gymnasts around her to win. Though, as shown through her relationship with Payson Keeler, this does not mean she never respects them. She often presents her relationship with coach Marty Walsh as being close, though he offers her no visible favoritism and it is left open as to why she does this (to get at the Rock girls, because they are close or because she would like them to be close). Above all she is committed to her gymnastics though shows concern as to how far Kaylie is going with her "Madonna arms." Though at the end of the season Kelly made a quick turn around her Mother wanted the notebook from Kaylie Cruz Kelly however got the notebook at a party. Kelly Parker gave it back knowing that she wanted to do the right thing Kaylie was mad but soon got over it and they reconciled.Then they won Gold in Worlds.

characters.name: Kim Keeler
characters.description: Kim KeelerBiographyGenderFemaleStatusMarried toMark KeelerFamilyMark Keeler(husband)Payson Keeler(daughter)Becca Keeler(daughter)RomancesMark Keeler(husband)ResidenceBoulder, Colorado, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes40First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.20:"Worlds Apart"Portrayed byPeri GilpinKim Keeleris a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She isPaysonandBecca's mother, and co-manager ofThe Rock. She is portrayed byPeri Gilpin. Kim is the loving mother and wife of her husband and two daughters. Even though she wants Payson to follow her dream of the Olympics, she also wants Payson to have a fun life and be a teenager. She is always there for her daughters when they need her. Kim also was the manager ofThe Rockuntil Payson had her accident and was told Payson could never compete again. She has Payson enroll in Public High School for a little while. She becomes co-manager, a title that she shares with Summer. When Payson recovers from her injury,SummerandSashaencourage her to run againstSteve Tannerfor president.

characters.name: Kim Keeler
characters.description: Kim KeelerBiographyGenderFemaleStatusMarried toMark KeelerFamilyMark Keeler(husband)Payson Keeler(daughter)Becca Keeler(daughter)RomancesMark Keeler(husband)ResidenceBoulder, Colorado, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1•2Episodes40First1.01:"Pilot"Last2.20:"Worlds Apart"Portrayed byPeri GilpinKim Keeleris a recurring character in thefirstandsecondseasons of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. characters.name: Lauren Tanner
characters.description: Lauren TannerBiographyGenderFemaleFamilySteve Tanner(father)Leslie Tanner(mother)RomancesCarter Anderson(ex-boyfriend)OccupationStudent, gymnastResidenceColoradoAppearancesFirst"Pilot"Last"United Stakes"Portrayed byCassie ScerboLauren Tanneris a main character in theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is a gymnast atThe Rockand best friends withKaylie Cruz. She is portrayed byCassie Scerbo. She is a gymnast atThe Rock, nicknamed "The Queen of the Beam". Lauren is very vindictive and manipulative and always tries to get her way. She is in love withKaylie's boyfriendCarterand sleeps with him at a party. After Carter and Kaylie break up, they resume sleeping together, but she eventually breaks up with him and gets him kicked out of the gym when he can't tell her that he loves her. Her mother is an addict who abandoned her andher fatherwhen she was young. After her mother dies, she learns that her mother tried to see her many times, but her father kept pushing her away. Lauren andPaysongo against each other to see who will be the captain but they end up becoming co-captains. Lauren is a gymnast atThe Rock. Lauren is also known as the 'Bitch'. She showed complete displeasure at havingEmily Kmetkoin the gym, scheming to try and find a way for her to be kicked out. She left The Rock after being beaten by Emily for 3rd place in the National Trials, but came back when The Rock found a new head coach, Sasha Belov. She has a crush on Carter, Kaylie's boyfriend, and later has sex with (and loses her virginity to) him as result of depression on her birthday. Lauren told Payson and Kaylie that she lost her virginity, but she does not say with whom. She shows jealousy towards Kaylie, even stealing a necklace that Carter gave to her. She is best friends with Kaylie and Payson. Lauren and her father, Steve, both dream of her participating in the Olympics. However, Lauren's performances, although full of 'fire' (as described bySasha Belov), lack likeability because Lauren never smiles. This is due to the fact that Lauren's biological mother is an addict, who loves getting high more than Lauren. According to her father, she has checked in and out of rehab numerous times, and wants nothing do with Lauren. In the episode "All's Fair in Love, War, and Gymnastics", Lauren leaves Carter's cell phone in Kaylie's parent's bathroom, where Kaylie's dad finds it, with pictures of Kaylie kissing Carter. After further rejection from Carter, she comes crying to Summer, since she is the only one who was there for Lauren. They talk and become close friends. Summer and Steve break up after Summer found out that Steve threatened Lauren's mom not to come to Nationals. This, however, makes Lauren believe that Summer left her, however Summer later shows up right after one of Lauren's routines, saying how she will always be Lauren's friend. Lauren later comes in fourth at Nationals. Although Kaylie still feels somewhat betrayed by Lauren, they agree not to let a boy come between th
characters.personality_section: Lauren is seen as the "mean girl" and is called the "bitch of the beam", due to her talent on the beam and her bitchiness. She does though have a soft side when it comes to her friends and family. She tries to hide her soft side and ignore her feelings but in truth she is very sensitive.

characters.name: Leo Cruz
characters.description: Leo CruzBiographyGenderMaleStatusSingleFamilyKaylie Cruz(sister)Ronnie Cruz(mother)Alex Cruz(father)RomancesEmily Kmetko(crush)AppearancesPortrayed byMarcus ColomaLeo Cruzis a recurring character in theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. He is the older brother ofKaylie Cruzand a former gymnast. He is portrayed byMarcus Coloma. He is an a former gymnast and a college student, but he moved back to Boulder to help Sasha with some coaching atThe Rock. He is very protective ofKaylieand punchesCarterwhen he learns he cheated on her. He went back to college inseason 2. All the gymnasts think he's sexy and they start flirting with him. He is a rich college student who when comes back to Boulder sparks interest in Emily. Though it is suspected that Leo likesEmily Kmetko, she had a relationship withDamon Young, so they just stayed friends.

characters.name: Leslie Tanner
characters.description: Leslie TannerisLauren Tanner's biological mother andSteve Tanner's ex-wife. Leslie was a druggie and abandoned Lauren two times. Although she did try to visit Lauren every year, Steve wouldn't allow it and threatened that if she saw Lauren without his permission, he would have her arrested. Steve then kept her away from Nationals making Lauren believe her mother didn't love her. Leslie afterwards died inSeason 2in a car accident. Lauren learns that Steve kept her own mother from her and leaves him for a while.

characters.name: Maeve Benson
characters.description: Maeve BensonMaeve Bensonis a minor character in thesecondseason of theABCdrama seriesMake It or Break It. She is portrayed byAlice Greczyn.

characters.name: Marcus
characters.description: MarcusMarcusportrayed bySean Maher.

characters.name: Mark Keeler
characters.description: Mark KeelerBiographyGenderMaleStatusMarried toKim KeelerFamilyKim Keeler(wife)Payson Keeler(daughter)Becca Keeler(daughter)RomancesKim Keeler(wife)ResidenceBoulder, Colorado, United StatesAppearancesSeasons1•2•3Episodes18First1.01:"Pilot"Last3.08:"United Stakes"Portrayed byBrett CullenMark KeelerisPaysonandBecca's father. After he loses his job in Boulder, he begins commuting to Minnesota for work. He is portrayed byBrett Cullen.

After he loses his job in Boulder, he begins commuting to Minnesota for work. He is portrayed byBrett Cullen.

characters.name: Marty Walsh
characters.description: Marty WalshMarty Walshis The Rock's first known coach. He is blackmailed because of his relationship with Kaylie's mother. He leaves The Rock and starts coaching Denver. He is chosen to coach the National Team and comes back to The Rock to coach the team. He is portrayed byErik Palladino. Marty is the former coach of The Rock, who leaves the club after Steve Tanner blackmails him with information about the relationship between Marty and Ronnie Cruz. Marty begins coaching at the Denver Elite Gymnastic Club, where his top gymnast is Kelly Parker. Marty and Ronnie still have feelings for one another, but break off their relationship. Marty becomes the coach of the National Team and, despite protests from The Rock girls, remains their coach. Marty is a three-time Olympic gold medalist, and the only person who has even beaten him is The Rock's current coach, Sasha Belov. Ellen Beals gets him fired from the National Team after he yelled at her for being to hard on Emily. Although theNational Teamtrains at The Rock, Marty is named their coach. He is fired from the National Team byEllen Bealsafter he tells her to stop bullyingEmily Kmetkoduring practice. Marty leaves the club after Steve Tanner blackmails him with information about the relationship between Marty and Ronnie Cruz. Marty begins coaching at the Denver Elite Gymnastic Club, where his top gymnast is Kelly Parker. Marty and Ronnie still have feelings for one another, but break off their relationship.
